snippet: Hey DenisValerievichMayorov! A third-party GitHub Application (Google Labs Jules) with the following permissions: - View your email addresses Was recently authorized to access your account. Visit https
subject: [GitHub] A third-party GitHub Application has been added to your account
body:
Hey DenisValerievichMayorov!

A third-party GitHub Application (Google Labs Jules) with the following permissions:

  - View your email addresses

Was recently authorized to access your account.

Visit https://github.com/settings/connections/applications/Iv1.c9e824e2df86c621 for more information.

To see this and other security events for your account, visit https://github.com/settings/security-log

If you run into problems, please contact support by visiting https://github.com/contact

Thanks,
The GitHub Team
